message:
fix(regex_engine): detect backreferences in needs_backtracking_engine

The function was only checking for lookahead/lookbehind but the linear-time
regex crate also doesn't support backreferences like \1, \2, etc.

Without this fix, patterns like `(\w+)\s+\1` would fail to compile because
they'd be sent to the linear-time engine which doesn't support backreferences.

Changes:
- Add backreference detection (\1-\9) to needs_backtracking_engine()
- Add comprehensive test coverage for backreference patterns
- Add tests for find() and replacen() with backtracking engine
- Expand test_needs_backtracking_detection with edge cases

Test count: 17 tests, all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
